{FULLNAME} has invited you to meet on NetQwix. 

NetQwix is a brand new teaching platform connecting Enthusiasts like you with highly qualified Experts like {FULLNAME1} for LIVE one-on-one training sessions conducted on NetQwix’s customized LIVE interactive meeting platform.  


NetQwix is available via any smartphone, computer or tablet with a webcam and reliable Internet access. 


How it Works:

1. Record a video or two while playing or practicing.

2. Join NetQwix and upload your videos in any format.

3. Search for {FULLNAME2} and request a Training Session. 

4. Training Sessions can be booked in advance or you can request an instant lesson – in which case NetQwix will contact {FULLNAME3} for immediate confirmation.

5. Payment will prompt NetQwix to provide a unique meeting link where you and {FIRSTNAME} will be magically connected inside NetQwix’s custom Live Session portal.

6. NetQwix’s system enables {FIRSTNAME1} to diagram and analyze selected footage live while you watch and the two of you discuss. The system also uses the phone cam/webcam and microphone so {FIRSTNAME2} can demonstrate and also watch you try to implement the changes you are discussing together.


7. The Training Sessions, as well as the video clips of all footage uploaded by you, are available for review in your personalized locker.

8. A printable Game Plan reflecting the Training Session experience will be generated by {FIRSTNAME3} and placed in your locker for future reference.

In summary, you and {FIRSTNAME4} will be able to train together easily and regulalry using NetQwix.

Click here to get started.


JOIN NOW


The NetQwix Team
